---
title: "My Projects"
page-layout: full
---

A selection of my work — research, data projects, and tools I've built.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Featured Projects

::::::: project-grid
:::: {.project-card .featured}
### Division 5 Agriculutral Water Use Dashboard

This dashboard analyzes evapotranspiration and consumptive use for irrigated fields in Colorado Water Division 5. I combined OpenET evapotranspiration products with surface Diversion data from the Colorado Decision Support System (CDSS) API, and built an interactive dashboard to explore patterns in water use across the region. The goal is to provide insights into how water is being used for irrigation, identify trends over time, and inform water management decisions in this the Colorado Headwaters.

**Tools:** R · OpenET · CDSS · RShiny

::: project-links
[Project Repo](https://github.com/nick-penzel/Ag_waterefficiency){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline} [About and Methods](https://nicks-dashboards.shinyapps.io/wateruse/){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline} [Agriculutral Water Use Dashboard](https://nicks-dashboards.shinyapps.io/wateruse/){.btn .btn-sm .btn-primary}
:::
::::

:::: {.project-card .featured}
### 📊 Project Title Two

**\[Tag: Data Science\]** · \[Year\]

Describe what you built, the key challenge, and the outcome. Keep it punchy — 2-3 sentences max.

**Tools:** Python · scikit-learn · Plotly

::: project-links
[{{< fa brands github >}} Code](https://github.com/yourusername/repo){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline} [{{< fa display >}} Dashboard](https://yoursite.com/dashboard){.btn .btn-sm .btn-primary}
:::
::::
:::::::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Other Projects

:::::: {.project-grid .small-grid}
::: project-card
### Project Three

Short description. What did you make and why?\
**Tools:** R · Shiny [GitHub](https://github.com/yourusername/repo){.project-link}
:::

::: project-card
### Project Four

Short description. What did you make and why?\
**Tools:** Python · FastAPI [GitHub](https://github.com/yourusername/repo){.project-link}
:::

::: project-card
### Project Five

Short description. What did you make and why?\
**Tools:** R · tidymodels [GitHub](https://github.com/yourusername/repo){.project-link}
:::
::::::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Writing

> **Protecting Montana’s Wetlands and Headwaters: State Policy Recommendations for
the Post Sackett v. the EPA Era**\
> Nick Penzel
> 2025 · [PDF](media/state-policy-brief.pdf)

> **International Governance in the Rio Grande/Bravo Basin:
Mechanisms for Improved Governance in Response to Drought and Development**\
> Nick Penzel
> 2025 · [PDF](media/rio-grande-brief.pdf)
